description_long: This object is a tall, upright hammer with a distinctive design, featuring a long, slender black handle that extends vertically from a robust, square-shaped base. The head of the hammer is unusually large and cylindrical, with a layered appearance and a wide, flat top, capped in black and encircled by a cream-colored band. The base appears to be made of a heavy, solid material, possibly metal or concrete, providing stability and weight. The handle is ribbed or fluted, suggesting added grip or structural reinforcement. The overall construction is industrial and robust, suitable for heavy-duty urban tasks. There are no visible signs of branding, wear, or additional attachments.
description: A tall, industrial hammer with a ribbed black handle, a wide cylindrical head, and a heavy square base, featuring a layered cream and black color scheme.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full height, ribbed handle, and the layered cylindrical head with a clear view of the square base.
description_view_1: Side view is nearly identical to the front, with the same features visible due to the symmetrical design.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, showing the same ribbed handle and head, with no additional features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again nearly identical to the front, highlighting the symmetrical and uniform structure.
attribute_handle_type: Long, straight, ribbed metal handle with a matte finish for enhanced grip.
attribute_head_type: Large, cylindrical sledge-type head with a wide, flat striking face and layered cream and black coloration.
